name: Wolfden Resources Corporation
summary: Wolfden Resources Corporation engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company explores for base metal deposits. It primarily holds a 100% interest in the Pickett Mountain project that covers approximately 6,871 acres of land located in Penobscot County, northern Maine, the United States. Wolfden Resources Corporation was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Thunder Bay, Canada.
